source.title: How Long Can I Rent a Fleet For?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How Long Can I Rent a Fleet For?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
In the current MVP release of Fleet Rentals, you can rent a fleet for a minimum of 1 day and up to 24 days.
This rental period gives you flexibility depending on your needs, whether you're planning a short-term mining operation or a multi-day strategic run across the Galia Expanse.
Future updates aim to extend rental durations up to 3 months, allowing for even more long-term planning and fleet utilization.
